'''Snaplaunce''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] and a [[Police officer/Legends|member]] of the [[Hweg Shul]] Municipal [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|Police]]. He and his partner [[Grupp]] saved [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] from near death at the hands of [[Taselda]]'s followers.

By [[44 ABY]] when Luke and his son, [[Ben Skywalker|Ben]], along with [[Vestara Khai]] visited [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]] in pursuit of [[Abeloth]], Snaplaunce was the [[Mayor/Legends|mayor]] of Hweg Shul. He acquired the position with the help of his [[TIE/sh VIP shuttle]], ''[[Vote Snaplaunce]]''. He loaned the group his shuttle to aid them in finding the fugitive, [[Cagaran Wei|Dr. Wei]]. Afterwards, he was stabbed in the back with a [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]], which was blamed on the Skywalkers. He later recovered and stated that it was not the Skywalkers who assaulted him.
